revision.comment: page move: Changed link from [[Template:Emptyor]] to [[Template:Empty or]] using [[User:BilledMammal/Move+|Move+]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:If-then-else templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and returns it if it is not empty. Otherwise it returns the second unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: }} of a Lua module that may return a value or nothing. Because it uses the {{#invoke: }} just once, it simplifies the coding of infoboxes, for example. The optional third and fourth unnamed parameters provide a prefix and a suffix for the first parameter when returned. This enables the designer to construct more complex templates that still only use one invoke of a Lua module. == Usage == ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} → {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}|unmarried}} === Prefix and suffix === ==== Infobox field with microformat ==== A value in an infobox can be designed to be wrapped in a microformat if the wikidata call is not empty: : {{if then show | {{#invoke:WikidataIB | getValue | rank=best |P19 |name=birth_place |qid={{{qid|}}} |suppressfields={{{suppressfields|}}} |fetchwikidata={{{fetchwikidata|}}} |noicon={{{noicon|}}} | {{{birth_place|}}} }} || | }} : If there is a local parameter supplied in the article (e.g. {{para|birth_place|London}}), the code will return London. : If there is no local parameter it will attempt to fetch a value for {{q|P19}} from Wikidata. : If that has a value, such as "New York", the code will return New York. : If there is no value returned from Wikidata, the code returns nothing. ==== Table ==== A table can be designed to display a row only when a particular property of the article exists on Wikidata. ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q151973}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q151973|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q151973}}|}} |} ; {{q|P26}} for {{q|Q905}} : {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} : → {| class="wikitable" |- ! scope="col" style="width:15em;" | Label ! scope="col" style="width:36em;" | Value {{If then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P26|qid=Q905|fwd=ALL|osd=no}}||{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|P26|qid=Q905}}|}} |} == See also == ; [[Template:Ifnoteq then show]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is equal to the second unnamed parameter and returns the third unnamed parameter if it does. Otherwise it returns the first unnamed parameter. This is useful when the first parameter is a {{#invoke: of a Lua module that returns a value for which a specific exception is required. ; [[Template:If then wikilink]] : tests whether the first unnamed parameter is not an empty string and if it isn't, it returns the parameter formatted as piped wiki-link using an optional namespace prefix. ; [[Template:Formatter link]] : takes an external identifier code as {{para|code}} and uses a formatter url as {{para|url}} to construct a link to the external resource, which uses the code as display. ; [[Template:Empty or|Template:Emptyor]] : tests a piece of text to ascertain whether it's effectively empty or contains some text. If the unnamed parameter consists only of html tags, punctuation (e.g. Wiki-markup) and whitespace, then Emptyor returns nothing; otherwise it returns the parameter unchanged. Wrapper for p.emptyor function. == See also == * {{mfl|params|value_of}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:If-then-else templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
